画面の右側には少女が描かれている。年若い人物で、肩ほどまでの短い黒髪。横顔でやや上を見上げるような姿勢をしており、表情は落ち着いていて感情をあまり表に出していない。服装は大きめのジャケットで、やや無骨で機能的なデザイン。背中にはリュックのような装備を背負っており、どこか都市探査や移動を思わせる雰囲気がある。

A small, impish forest creature stands centered in a sunlit meadow, its body covered in soft, tousled fur blending shades of gray, cream, and muted blue. Its oversized head dominates the frame, with enormous glossy eyes reflecting light like glass marbles and a wide, slightly unsettling smile stretched across its face. A monochrome, high-contrast image presents a surreal fusion of a human face and a raven’s body against a textured, aged backdrop. Centered in the frame, a large black raven stands grounded, its body angled slightly to the right. The bird’s head is partially replaced by the left half of a human face, seamlessly blended into the raven’s form. The human eye looks forward with a calm, distant expression, while the raven’s beak extends outward, slightly open, as if mid-call. Above and around the hybrid figure, the background appears worn and distressed, with smudges, scratches, and darkened stains that resemble burn marks or ink blots. At the top center, the word “NEVERMORE.” is printed in clean, serif typography, stark against the otherwise damaged surface. The edges of the image show subtle curling or peeling, suggesting aged paper or a deteriorating photograph. The composition is minimal but unsettling, with the figure occupying the lower center and the text floating above, creating a sense of quiet finality and psychological unease.

images.alt: Battle-ready pastel-colored mecha inspired by Gundam, illustrated in a clean, minimal, Charles Schulz–inspired cartoon style; the mech stands in a dynamic mid-action pose in a city battle scene with simplified buildings, smoke puffs, and stylized explosions; soft pastel palette (baby blue, pink, mint, pale yellow) with bold clean linework and flat shading; the head of the mech features a Snoopy-like beagle face inside a rounded Gundam helmet, expressive and calm; oversized limbs and slightly rounded proportions to match Peanuts-style charm; background includes playful signage, minimal perspective, and whimsical destruction; composition is crisp, graphic, and editorial; square format, high detail, balanced negative space.

images.alt: A candid black-and-white editorial photograph inside a subway train: three young women sit closely together on a bench under harsh fluorescent lighting, all laughing and leaning inward; only the middle girl holds a smartphone, slightly extended toward the group, becoming the focal point, while the two girls on either side react and laugh without holding devices; the girl on the left is Black with natural textured hair in a high puff, the girl on the right is white with light skin and tied-back hair, and the middle girl remains unchanged with a neutral ethnic appearance; an elderly woman stands beside them, leaning in warmly and smiling, holding her own phone out to share something back; everyone is engaged in a shared moment of joy and curiosity; metallic subway poles, window reflections, and poster ads frame the background; high shutter speed freezes expressions, subtle film grain, documentary-style composition, slight wide-angle lens, crisp detail, authentic human connection, landscape orientation.
